evals.prompt: Add password strength meter to signup form. Follow TDD and include tests.
evals.expected_output: Creates failing tests first, implements minimal feature, adds unit+UI coverage, and updates snapshots intentionally.

evals.prompt: Fix bug where tapping Save twice submits duplicate requests in profile screen.
evals.expected_output: Starts with failing regression tests, applies minimal fix, validates with unit/UI tests, and handles snapshot updates if changed.

evals.prompt: Refactor theme toggle component and ensure tests are complete.
evals.expected_output: Uses Red-Green-Refactor flow, keeps behavior stable with unit/UI tests, updates snapshots only when intentional, asks before Maestro, starts adb screenrecord first, and saves the pull under .maestro/recordings/.
